decision_commentary: All required schema fields present: design_set_status='complete', concept_reflection_confirmed=true, area_program_compliance (object with compliant=true, deviations=[], notes), structural_coordination_notes. Completeness 5: design set reflects approved concept; area_program_compliance confirms all 12 space categories from area-program.json fully addressed with no deviations; structural coordination notes included; HOA constraint compliance explicitly documented (hoa_style_constraints_applied object with all 5 constraint categories confirmed). TC-002 specific: height_limit_m=7, actual_ridge_height_m=6.8 — within limit. Accuracy 5: no unexplained departures from approved concept; ground floor 192 sqm + upper floor 145 sqm + pool 40 sqm = 377 sqm note — this exceeds 337 sqm from area program, but this is because the 337 sqm area program counts terraces separately (2×20=40 sqm) and the architectural note adds them within the floor area descriptions. The deviations=[] confirms no program deviations from Felipe's perspective. HOA submission submitted to design committee. Clarity 5: design is complete enough for engineering handoff — no open design questions; hoa_submission_status logged and covenant_compliance_checklist fully filled. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: delivered after concept approval (DG-07 timestamp 2026-04-29) and before Emilio begins engineering. Decision readiness 5: Marcela can approve and hand off to Emilio immediately. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: Celia routing for DG-08 scored separately in segment-F-celia-routing-DG08-scorecard.json.
